02 — tool stack

Two tracks, one export

The programs every project runs through, laid out like a project panel.
Premiere ProV1 — podcast & multicam edit
Multicam sync Podcast pacing Auto captions Audio mixing Clip re-versioning for reels
After EffectsV2 — motion graphics

03 — about

Behind the cut

I edit podcasts and build the motion graphics that make them feel finished — clean multicam cuts, tight pacing, and titles that move with the conversation instead of sitting on top of it.

Most projects move through Premiere Pro for the multicam edit, pacing, and audio, then into After Effects for anything that needs to be built rather than trimmed: kinetic titles, lower thirds, brand animation.

I like long-form conversations that need a strong cut down into reels, and I like being handed raw multicam footage — that's usually where the best edit is hiding.

Primary NLEAdobe Premiere Pro
CompositingAdobe After Effects
Turnaround3–7 days typical
DeliveryH.264, vertical reels + widescreen episodes
Based inDelhi, India
